basic_details.job_title: NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission Tamil Nadu (SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu) has released the official Consultant Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced under the SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 45 years with a qualification of Medical Graduate or Postgraduate degree in Public Health, Health Management, Community Medicine, Preventive & Social Medicine, Health Informatics, Data Science, Public Policy, or related disciplines can submit their offline applications on or before 23 July 2026. The official notification PDF a

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Medical Graduate, Postgraduate degree in Public Health, Health Management, Community Medicine, Preventive & Social Medicine, Health Informatics, Data Science, Public Policy or related disciplines
qualification.details: Consultant: Medical Graduate / Postgraduate degree in Public Health / Health Management / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Informatics / Data Science / Public Policy or related disciplines from a recognised institution with minimum 2-5 years relevant experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.national_health_mission_tamil_nadu: Medical Graduate, Postgraduate degree in Public Health, Health Management, Community Medicine, Preventive & Social Medicine, Health Informatics, Data Science, Public Policy or related disciplines

content_sections.heading: SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Consultant: Medical Graduate / Postgraduate degree in Public Health / Health Management / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Informatics / Data Science / Public Policy or related disciplines from a recognised institution with minimum 2-5 years relevant experience

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 45 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Consultant posts is 23rd July 2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Consultant posts in SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies announced for the Consultant posts under the National Health Mission Tamil Nadu. These positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Consultant recruitment is Offline. Interested candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Consultant post must not be more than 45 years of age. Age relaxation details, if any, would be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Consultant post at SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Consultant position will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 60,000 per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications required for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: Applicants should hold a Medical Graduate or a Postgraduate degree in Public Health, Health Management, Community Medicine, or related disciplines from a recognized institution with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Consultant posts in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The direct link to download the official notification PDF is available in the "Important Links" section of this article. Candidates must read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The Consultant positions at SHSRC NHM Tamil Nadu are on a contractual basis. Details regarding the duration of the contract will be specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The selection process details for the Consultant posts are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information on the selection procedure.
